body.short_description: MFA policy drift detected — legacy auth not fully blocked on agency tenant
body.description: UIAO detected a configuration drift on the MFA enforcement policy. Legacy authentication protocols remain enabled contrary to the agency baseline. Control: IA-2(1).

result.short_description: MFA policy drift detected — legacy auth not fully blocked on agency tenant
result.description: UIAO detected a configuration drift on the MFA enforcement policy. Legacy authentication protocols remain enabled contrary to the agency baseline. Control: IA-2(1).

expected_behavior: Adapter MUST parse result.sys_id (32-char hex) and store it for subsequent PATCH operations.
Adapter MUST map result.number to the canonical ticket_number claim (INC-prefixed string).
Adapter MUST treat result.state == '1' as NewIncident lifecycle state.
Adapter MUST emit an OSCAL observation citing control IA-2 when uiao_control_id is present in the response.
Adapter MUST NOT retry on HTTP 201 — exactly one incident record was created.

primary_citation.quote: Inserts one record in the specified table. Multiple record insertion is not supported by this method.

provenance.sanitization: ServiceNow instance hostname replaced with uiao-dev.service-now.com. Bearer token redacted to <TOKEN>. sys_id values are deterministic synthetic 32-char hex strings, not from any real tenant. Agency code DOJ is from the canonical UIAO agency list.
